title: Communications
subtitle: Official messages from Aipify Group AS — sales recognition, settlements, compliance, and partner updates.
errorMessage: Aipify could not load your communication history right now. Please try again.
accessDenied: Growth Partner access is required to view communications.
preferencesSubtitle: Choose which partner emails you receive. Aipify Group AS may still send required compliance and settlement notices.
systemCriticalNote: Compliance, settlement, agreement, and payment notices may still be sent when required.
emptyMessage: When Aipify sends sales recognition, settlement, or official partner messages, they will appear here.
subject: Subject
faqWhyEmail: Why did I receive a partner email?
faqWhyEmailAnswer: Aipify sends partner emails for important events such as sales, milestones, settlements, compliance updates and official partner communications.
faqPreferences: Can I change my email preferences?
faqPreferencesAnswer: Yes. Growth Partners can manage most communication preferences from the Partner Portal. Critical compliance and settlement messages may still be sent.
faqSenderAnswer: Official partner emails are sent by Aipify Group AS or approved Aipify communication identities.
